title: How to Use Claude Design – Full AI Design Workflow 2026
summary: Claude Design is an AI design tool by Anthropic that automates design workflows by generating branded landing pages and design assets from a design system. The tutorial demonstrates a four-step framework for building design systems and producing production-ready outputs, positioning it as a Figma alternative.
writeup: This tutorial walks through Claude Design as a Figma alternative for design work, organized around a four-step framework: building a design system, generating designs, editing them, and deploying templates. It positions Claude Design as a production-ready assistant that holds brand consistency across outputs. The concrete takeaways are the structured workflow itself and the use of prompt engineering and workflow automation to keep a consistent brand throughout the design process.
